rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Always write tests first (TDD) following existing test patterns like csrf-middleware.test.ts — same directory structure and mocking style.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The Write tool requires explicit permission before writing plan files — taskify agents may fail silently or halt if this permission isn't pre-granted.","scope":"plan writing"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Fixed-window rate limiter in rateLimit.ts is a separate implementation from the existing sliding-window rate-limiter.ts — not a replacement, both coexist.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Use existing rate-limiter.ts as a reference for IP resolution (byIp), whitelist/blacklist logic, and header conventions (X-RateLimit-*, Retry-After).","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts"}]}
